Anduril's Lattice OS; $2.2B 2025 revenue doubling; $20B Army IDIQ contract details; 40-50% gross margins vs 5-10% for traditional primes
UN General Assembly Nov 2025 resolution calls for legally binding LAWS treaty; US and Russia rejected LAWS regulation frameworks; geopolitical fractures in autonomous weapons governance

Shield AI projecting 80%+ revenue growth in 2026 equating to at least $540M; $12.7B valuation confirmed; Collaborative Combat Aircraft program details

unverified_claims: Market share percentages for Palantir (35%), Anduril (28%), Shield AI (8%), Helsing (6%), Traditional Primes (23%) are analyst estimates derived from proportional revenue and funding data — no single authoritative market share breakdown was found for AI-native defense tech specifically
search_volume (~65K/mo) is an estimate — no Keywords Everywhere data was pulled for this session
growth_3m (+18%) is extrapolated from Q1 2026 VC inflows vs Q1 2025 — not a direct market size measurement
